recent_excerpts: US DOJ, Canada, and Germany dismantled four IoT botnets — Aisuru, Kimwolf, JackSkid, Mossad — compromising 3M+ devices, enabling record-breaking DDoS attacks.
Mirai botnet operators exploit CVE-2025-29635, a CVSS 8.8 command injection flaw in end-of-life D-Link DIR-823X routers, to deploy malware and launch DDoS attacks.

A new Mirai botnet variant, 'Nexcorium,' is exploiting a command injection flaw (CVE-2024-3721) in TBK DVRs and end-of-life TP-Link routers to conscript devices into a distributed denial-of-service (D
